name: x-plugin-codex
description: Codex MCP plugin for X/Twitter using the local x-cli.

interface.shortDescription: Read and post on X through local x-cli.
interface.longDescription: X for Codex exposes typed MCP tools for profile lookup, timelines, tweet lookup, search, mentions, and explicit write actions by wrapping the local x-cli installation. It reuses existing x-cli credentials and does not implement its own auth flow.
